prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild infirmary; Toma Starling in cream and mint robes and Toma Ashbell in reinforced leather armor work together. Small glowing mischievous healing sprites hover over a spilled puddle of blue potion on the wooden floor. Starling calmly waves his hands to shoo the sprites away while Ashbell reaches down with a cleaning cloth. Soft lamplight, clear anime RPG aesthetic, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild infirmary shot; Ashbell kneels to wipe up the spilled blue potion with a cloth, while Starling uses a gentle, glowing magical gesture to guide the remaining sprites into a nearby glass vial. They share a brief, cooperative nod of success. Consistent character appearance and camera angle, no text, no watermark.
